prompt: Focused single-issue feedback: empty map circles look broken at low zoom. First-impression concern. One screenshot.

assertions.text: Extracts 1-2 focused findings — does not inflate to 5+ findings from a single observation
SBE proposes concrete visual behavior — zoom threshold, store count display, or specific sizing — not vague 'should look better'
Captures the first-impression business rationale — user said 'first thing users see when they open the map'
Does NOT scope into other map issues (flow lines, choropleth colors, panel layout)
